children.heading: Compilation and organization of records
children.label: c Compilation and organization of records
children.text: The Department of Defense may not be required, when conducting a special search, to compile or organize records that have already been declassified and placed into the public domain.
A statutory requirement to conduct a declassification review on a specified set of agency records.
An Executive order to conduct a declassification review on a specified set of agency records.
An order from the President or an official with delegated authority from the President to conduct a declassification review on a specified set of agency records.
